title: Ansible Task Retry Exhaustion and Max Failures
app: Enable verbose task logging to HEC for critical playbooks only
spl:
index=iac sourcetype="ansible:callback" OR sourcetype="awx:job_events"
| search "retries" AND ("failed" OR "Giving up" OR "Final result: FAILED")
| stats count by playbook, host, task
| where count>=5
| sort -count
description: Exhausted retries extend change windows and may leave partial configuration.
value: Highlights tasks that burn through retries so owners fix flakiness or ordering.
implementation: Filter to production playbooks; sample in lower environments. Use `task` field from callback JSON.

references.title: AWX logging integration (job events, activity stream)
